scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @cjp/backend" "npm run dev -w @cjp/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate -w @cjp/backend && npm run build -w @cjp/backend && npm run build -w @cjp/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @cjp/backend && npm run lint -w @cjp/frontend
